features.name: fsm_encoding attribute on next_state signal
features.description: Code should include an FSM with fsm_encoding attribute incorrectly placed on next_state signal instead of state register

features.name: case equality operator in FSM state comparison
features.description: Code should include FSM state transitions using === (case equality) operator for comparisons instead of ==

features.name: parameter bit indexing in FSM comparisons
features.description: Code should include FSM state machine where state transitions depend on parameter bit indexing like pass[N]

features.name: multi-bit state and next_state FSM registers
features.description: Code should include FSM with multi-bit state and next_state registers declared together in same declaration

features.name: FSM with async reset and separate next_state logic
features.description: Code should include FSM with async reset on state register and separate combinational next_state logic in always block
